mapper.sql: A.NCONFIG_LINK_MST_SEQ, A.SA_OFFICECODE, A.SA_HOST_IP, A.SA_HOST_NM , A.SA_IF_IP, A.PA_IF_INET, A.SA_IF_NM, A.SA_IF_DESCRIPTION , A.NA_FLAG_LEVEL, A.SG_OFFICECODE, A.SG_HOST_IP, A.SG_HOST_NM , A.SG_IF_IP, A.PG_IF_INET, A.SG_IF_NM, A.SG_IF_DESCRIPTION , A.NG_FLAG_LEVEL, A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM FCT.TB_CONFIG_LINK_MST A
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM FCT.TB_CONFIG_LINK_MST A
